codeReview.summary: The change removes the search and notification controls and updates the existing layout test, but it regresses the stated design contract because the referenced `dashboard.pen` still includes both header action icons alongside the avatar.

issues.description: The feature removes the search and notification controls entirely, but the referenced design source `ui/三维校审/dashboard.pen` still defines `headerRight` with `searchIcon`, `bellIcon`, and a 36x36 avatar. This implementation therefore does not match the design it claims to follow.

The updated test locks in the same incorrect assumption by asserting that the search and notification buttons must be absent, so the automated coverage now enforces behavior that conflicts with the design spec instead of protecting it.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker handoff states that the `dashboard.pen` header-right area contains only the avatar, but the checked-in design file still contains search and bell icons plus the avatar. The shared design knowledge is therefore inconsistent with reality and can mislead later workers/reviewers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff interactive check for session `150625f0-3755-4a28-8da5-9ff574b1a57a` says the design shows only a 36x36 avatar; `ui/三维校审/dashboard.pen` under `mainHeader -> headerRight` contains `searchIcon`, `bellIcon`, and `avatar`.

summary: Fail: the implementation and updated test both remove header actions, but the referenced design artifact still includes those actions, so the feature does not satisfy its own design-alignment claim.
